scope.summary: Implement an auto_sew authoring operation that analyzes placed panel edges in 3D (after initial arrangement MT-119) for proximity and matching arc length, proposes SeamSpec candidates, and presents them as a model-reviewable proposal batch via TailorPanelAiEditProposalRecorded before committing
acceptance_criteria: The auto_sew MCP tool accepts (garment_id, tolerance_mm: f32, kinds: Vec<SeamKind>) and runs a proximity-and-length-match heuristic over the placed panels: edge pairs within tolerance_mm of each other and with length ratio within 20x (GATHER_RATIO_RANGE limit) are proposed
Proposals are emitted as TailorPanelAiEditProposalRecorded events (not direct authority writes) per GAR-CRDT-003, surfaced to the operator via TailorPanelAiEditProposalDecided before promotion
Dart edges (DartSpec opening_edges) are included as Fold-kind seam candidates (auto-detect fold seams from dart geometry)
The auto_sew result includes a confidence score per proposed seam pair and a suggested gather_ratio derived from the edge length ratio

At least the 5 starter garment templates (MT-137: tee, skirt, dress, trousers, bodice) can be fully auto-sewn from their panel placements with zero manual seam specification and produce passing SEAM_LENGTH_MATCH results
scope.risk_if_missed: Auto Sewing is the primary productivity feature for model-first garment authoring: a model that emits panel geometry from a parametric template should not need to enumerate every seam manually. Without auto_sew the model must output hundreds of explicit SeamSpec entries for a multi-panel garment, increasing token cost, hallucination risk, and round-trip latency. This directly undermines the ChatGarment-style interactive authoring advantage (MOAT-8).

risks: Broad MT scope can hide multiple review targets.
Markdown MT lists may disagree with packet-declared active/next MT truth.
Receipt routing may target an old MT if contract identity is omitted.
minimum_controls: Exactly one primary proof target per MT unless the packet records why not.
MT identity must be stable and referenced by receipt correlation.
Generated projection drift must not wake Coder or Validator by itself.
